nasb.text: These are they who were called of the congregation, the leaders of their fathers’ tribes; they were the heads of divisions of Israel.”

esv.text: These were the ones chosen from the congregation, the chiefs of their ancestral tribes, the heads of the clans of Israel.

cnv.text: 這些人是從會眾中選出來，都是他們宗族支派的領袖；他們是以色列的族長。”

ccb.text: 他们都是从会众中选出来的，是各支派的首领，也是以色列的将领。
